parameters.text:
=You are a publishing assistant helping prepare book metadata for marketing and production use.

<<<BOOK_START>>>
{{ String($json.content) }}
<<<BOOK_END>>>

Now, use these known values:
- Book Title: {{ $('Code').item.json.title }}
- Author Name: {{ $('Code').item.json.author }}
- Estimated Word Count: {{ $('Word Count').item.json.estimatedWordCount }}

Do not modify the book title or author. Use the word count exactly as given.

---

📋 Your task:  
Read the full manuscript and return the marketing metadata in the following **structured, markdown-formatted text block**. Do **not** return JSON or code blocks. Just use clean markdown formatting.

---

Format Template (fill in below the headings):

Title: {{ $('Code').item.json.title }}
Subtitle: [Write a relevant short subtitle using the tropes and genre. Leave blank if not obvious.]
Series Name & Number: [e.g., True Platinum, Book 2 — or leave blank if none]

Standalone or Series Hook: [Does it stand alone, or are there crossover/series hooks?]

Release Date:

Word Count: {{ $('Word Count').item.json.estimatedWordCount }}

Spice Level: 🌶️🌶️🌶️ (Describe intensity + content tags: e.g., “Fade to black” or “Multiple detailed scenes with kink”)

Tropes:
[List 5–7 relevant romance tropes, one per line]

Universal Fantasies:
[List 3–5 common reader fantasies explored in this book]

READER POSITIONING
Core Reader Fantasy: [One sentence capturing the heart of the reader fantasy]

Emotional Vibe: [3–6 words about the emotional tone: e.g., “angsty, funny, tender, hot”]

Reader Promises: [One sentence summarising emotional/narrative payoff]

Top 5 Keywords for SEO: [Short phrases, lowercase, comma-separated]

Top 5 Hashtags: [Hashtag format, camelCase or lowercase with no punctuation]

---

Amazon Keywords
[List 7–10 short Amazon-style search phrases, 2–5 words each, that would help readers find this book — especially via tropes, fantasies, subgenre, or emotional hook.]

---

### 🧾 Example Output (for reference only — do not copy)

**Title:** Married Blind
**Subtitle:** A Marriage of Convenience Hollywood Romance  
**Series Name & Number:** *Kings of Screen*, Book 2 (can be read as a standalone)  

**Standalone or Series Hook:** Standalone with series Easter eggs and crossover characters (Finn is friends with Shaun from *Between Takes*)  

**Release Date:**  

**Word Count:** 85,000  

**Spice Level:** 🌶️🌶️🌶️🌶️ (Explicit scenes. Rope, control, mutual kink exploration. Emotional and physical intimacy.)  

---

### **Tropes:**
- Marriage of Convenience  
- Reality TV Romance  
- Celebrity x Civilian  
- Grumpy x Sunshine  
- Forced Proximity  

### **Universal Fantasies:**
- The regular girl wins the heart of a celebrity  
- Strangers-to-lovers with instant chemistry  
- Someone saving them from their problems  

---

## READER POSITIONING

- **Core Reader Fantasy:** A broke but brilliant woman accidentally marries a Hollywood star on reality TV and ends up with both love and security.  
- **Emotional Vibe:** Sexy, slow-burn with laugh-out-loud banter, reality-TV chaos, and emotional softness underneath the snark.  
- **Reader Promises:** You’ll get spice, sass, and surprising softness. There’s real healing under the heat, found family, and a man who goes from “it’s just a role” to “I’ll never let you go.”  
- **Top 5 Keywords for SEO:** celebrity romance, fake marriage, reality TV love story, steamy grumpy sunshine romance, opposites attract romance  
- **Top 5 Hashtags:** #MarriageOfConvenience #CelebrityRomance #GrumpySunshine #RomanceReaders #FakeMarriageRealFeels  

---

## **Amazon Keywords**
1. wealthy hollywood celebrity romance novel  
2. slow burn enemies to lovers steamy romance  
3. reality television dating show romance  
4. arranged marriage of convenience  
5. close proximity fake wedding enemies-to-lovers  
6. famous actor normal strong female lead  
7. British movie star actor down on his luck

parameters.content:
Gathering Metadata
(Title, Series Name & Number, Standalone or Series Hook, Release Date, Word Count, Spice Level, Tropes, Universal Fantasies. READER POSITIONING: Core Reader Fantasy, Emotional Vibe, Reader Promises, Top 5 Keywords for SEO, Top 5 Hashtags, Amazon Keywords)
Message must ONLY contain Title BY Author
This will be called by the marketing bible agent.

assignments.name: response
assignments.value: =The following metadata has been added to the Google Doc: {{ $('JSON Translator').item.json.formattedText }}
